10408: 
10409: <script id="pmd-v175c-no-dupe-no-blink-script">
10410: (function () {
10411:   'use strict';
10412: 
10413:   if (window.PMDWaiterFloorStableV175b && window.PMDWaiterFloorStableV175b.stop) {
10414:     try { window.PMDWaiterFloorStableV175b.stop(); } catch (e) {}
10415:   }
10416: 
10417:   if (window.PMDWaiterFloorStableV175c && window.PMDWaiterFloorStableV175c.active) return;
10418:   if (!/\/admin\/dashboardwaiter(?:$|[?#\/])/.test(location.pathname + location.search + location.hash)) return;
10419: 
10420:   document.documentElement.classList.add('pmd-waiter-dashboard-active');
10421: 
10422:   var CLEANING_IMG = '/app/admin/assets/images/pmd/Cleaning.png';
10423:   var TABLE_ENDPOINT = '/admin/pmd-waiter-table-states-v154';
10424:   var NOTIF_ENDPOINT = '/admin/notifications-api';
10425: 
10426:   var POLL_MS = 10000;
10427:   var TILE_CLASS = 'pmd-v175c-floor-tile';
10428:   var NUMBER_CLASS = 'pmd-v175c-table-number';
10429:   var BADGE_CLASS = 'pmd-v175c-attention-badge';
10430:   var HIDE_CLASS = 'pmd-v175c-hide-dupe-number';
10431: 
10432:   var OLD_BADGE_SELECTORS = [
10433:     '[data-pmd-v170f-slot-badge]',
10434:     '[data-pmd-v170c-attention-badge]',
10435:     '[data-pmd-v170b-attention-badge]',
10436:     '.pmd-v170g-pinned-badge',
10437:     '.pmd-v174-attention-badge',
10438:     '.pmd-v175b-attention-badge'
10439:   ].join(',');
10440: 
10441:   var OLD_NUMBER_SELECTORS = [
10442:     '.pmd-v175b-table-number'
10443:   ].join(',');
10444: 
10445:   var TILE_SELECTORS = [
10446:     '.pmd-w5-table',
10447:     '.pmd-v155-table',
10448:     '.pmd-floor-table',
10449:     '.pmd-waiter-floor-table',
10450:     '[data-table]',
10451:     '[data-table-number]',
10452:     '[data-table-no]'
10453:   ].join(',');
10454: 
10455:   var state = {
10456:     tableMap: {},
10457:     attentionMap: {},
10458:     timer: null,
10459:     observer: null,
10460:     raf: 0,
10461:     updates: 0
10462:   };
10463: 
10464:   function clean(v) {
10465:     return String(v == null ? '' : v).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
10466:   }
10467: 
10468:   function setImportant(el, prop, value) {
10469:     if (!el || !el.style) return;
10470:     if (el.style.getPropertyValue(prop) === value && el.style.getPropertyPriority(prop) === 'important') return;
10471:     el.style.setProperty(prop, value, 'important');
10472:   }
10473: 
10474:   function parsePayload(n) {
10475:     try {
10476:       if (!n || !n.payload) return {};
10477:       return typeof n.payload === 'string' ? JSON.parse(n.payload) : n.payload;
10478:     } catch (e) {
10479:       return {};
10480:     }
10481:   }
10482: 
10483:   function isHandled(n) {
10484:     if (!n) return true;
10485:     if (n.read === true || n.seen === true || n.is_read === true || n.is_seen === true) return true;
10486:     if (n.status && /read|seen|dismiss|archiv|closed|done/i.test(String(n.status))) return true;
10487: 
10488:     return [
10489:       n.read_at,
10490:       n.seen_at,
10491:       n.dismissed_at,
10492:       n.archived_at,
10493:       n.deleted_at,
10494:       n.recipient_read_at,
10495:       n.recipient_seen_at
10496:     ].some(Boolean);
10497:   }
10498: 
10499:   function tableNoFromNotification(n) {
10500:     var p = parsePayload(n);
10501:     var candidates = [
10502:       n && n.table_name,
10503:       p.table_name,
10504:       p.table_label,
10505:       p.table,
10506:       p.table_no,
10507:       p.table_number,
10508:       n && n.message,
10509:       n && n.title
10510:     ].map(clean).filter(Boolean);
10511: 
10512:     for (var i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) {
10513:       var s = candidates[i];
10514: 
10515:       var m = s.match(/\bTable\s*#?\s*(\d+)\b/i);
10516:       if (m) return m[1];
10517: 
10518:       m = s.match(/\bT\s*#?\s*(\d+)\b/i);
10519:       if (m) return m[1];
10520: 
10521:       if (/^\d+$/.test(s)) return s;
10522:     }
10523: 
10524:     return '';
10525:   }
10526: 
10527:   function removeKnownOldBadges(root) {
10528:     (root || document).querySelectorAll(OLD_BADGE_SELECTORS).forEach(function (el) {
10529:       if (el && el.parentNode) el.parentNode.removeChild(el);
10530:     });
10531: 
10532:     (root || document).querySelectorAll(OLD_NUMBER_SELECTORS).forEach(function (el) {
10533:       if (el && el.parentNode) el.parentNode.removeChild(el);
10534:     });
10535: 
10536:     (root || document).querySelectorAll('.pmd-v170g-pinned-tile').forEach(function (el) {
10537:       el.classList.remove('pmd-v170g-pinned-tile');
10538:     });
10539:   }
10540: 
10541:   function tableNoFromElement(el) {
10542:     if (!el || el.nodeType !== 1) return '';
10543: 
10544:     var attrs = [
10545:       'data-table-number',
10546:       'data-table-no',
10547:       'data-table',
10548:       'data-pmd-table-number',
10549:       'data-pmd-table-no'
10550:     ];
10551: 
10552:     for (var i = 0; i < attrs.length; i++) {
10553:       var v = clean(el.getAttribute(attrs[i]));
10554:       if (/^\d+$/.test(v)) return v;
10555:     }
10556: 
10557:     var clone = el.cloneNode(true);
10558:     clone.querySelectorAll('.' + BADGE_CLASS + ', .' + NUMBER_CLASS + ', ' + OLD_BADGE_SELECTORS + ', ' + OLD_NUMBER_SELECTORS).forEach(function (x) {
10559:       x.remove();
10560:     });
10561: 
10562:     var txt = clean(clone.textContent || '');
10563:     var m = txt.match(/\b(\d{1,3})\b/);
10564:     return m ? m[1] : '';
10565:   }
10566: 
10567:   function floorElements() {
10568:     return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll([
10569:       '.pmd-w5-floor-map',
10570:       '.pmd-w5-floor-map-real',
10571:       '.pmd-v155-floor-map',
10572:       '[class*="floor-map"]'
10573:     ].join(','))).filter(function (el) {
10574:       var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
10575:       return r.width > 300 && r.height > 80;
10576:     });
10577:   }
10578: 
10579:   function activeCardsTopY() {
10580:     var nodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,div,span,strong'));
10581:     var header = nodes.find(function (el) {
10582:       var t = clean(el.textContent);
10583:       if (!/Active Order Cards/i.test(t)) return false;
10584:       if (t.length > 40) return false;
10585:       var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
10586:       return r.width > 20 && r.height > 10;
10587:     });
10588: 
10589:     return header ? header.getBoundingClientRect().top : window.innerHeight;
10590:   }
10591: 
10592:   function findTiles() {
10593:     var floorBottom = activeCardsTopY();
10594:     var all = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(TILE_SELECTORS));
10595:     var byNo = new Map();
10596: 
10597:     all.forEach(function (el) {
10598:       if (!el || el.closest('.pmd-v35-card, .pmd-order-card, [class*="order-card"]')) return;
10599: 
10600:       var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
10601:       if (r.top >= floorBottom) return;
10602:       if (r.width < 50 || r.width > 230) return;
10603:       if (r.height < 40 || r.height > 190) return;
10604: 
10605:       var no = tableNoFromElement(el);
10606:       if (!no) return;
10607: 
10608:       var area = r.width * r.height;
10609:       var prev = byNo.get(no);

===== LINES 10747-11557 =====
10747: 
10748:   function isCornerSmallBadge(parent, child) {
10749:     var pr = parent.getBoundingClientRect();
10750:     var cr = child.getBoundingClientRect();
10751: 
10752:     if (cr.width > 46 || cr.height > 46) return false;
10753: 
10754:     var nearRight = cr.left > pr.right - 55;
10755:     var nearTop = cr.top < pr.top + 30;
10756: 
10757:     return nearRight && nearTop;
10758:   }
10759: 
10760:   function hideDuplicateNumbers(tile) {
10761:     var el = tile.el;
10762:     var no = tile.tableNo;
10763: 
10764:     Array.from(el.childNodes).forEach(function (node) {
10765:       if (node.nodeType === 3) {
10766:         if (clean(node.nodeValue) === no) node.nodeValue = '';
10767:         return;
10768:       }
10769: 
10770:       if (node.nodeType !== 1) return;
10771: 
10772:       var child = node;
10773: 
10774:       if (child.classList.contains(NUMBER_CLASS)) return;
10775:       if (child.classList.contains(BADGE_CLASS)) return;
10776: 
10777:       if (child.matches && child.matches(OLD_BADGE_SELECTORS + ', ' + OLD_NUMBER_SELECTORS)) {
10778:         child.remove();
10779:         return;
10780:       }
10781: 
10782:       var text = clean(child.textContent || '');
10783:       if (text !== no) return;
10784: 
10785:       if (isCornerSmallBadge(el, child)) return;
10786: 
10787:       var fs = parseFloat(getComputedStyle(child).fontSize || '0') || 0;
10788:       var cr = child.getBoundingClientRect();
10789: 
10790:       if (fs >= 18 || cr.width > 32 || cr.height > 32) {
10791:         child.classList.add(HIDE_CLASS);
10792:         child.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
10793:         setImportant(child, 'display', 'none');
10794:       }
10795:     });
10796:   }
10797: 
10798:   function ensureNumber(tile) {
10799:     var el = tile.el;
10800:     var no = tile.tableNo;
10801:     var label = el.querySelector(':scope > .' + NUMBER_CLASS);
10802: 
10803:     if (!label) {
10804:       label = document.createElement('span');
10805:       label.className = NUMBER_CLASS;
10806:       el.appendChild(label);
10807:     }
10808: 
10809:     if (label.textContent !== no) label.textContent = no;
10810:   }
10811: 
10812:   function setTileVisual(tile) {
10813:     var el = tile.el;
10814:     var no = tile.tableNo;
10815: 
10816:     el.classList.add(TILE_CLASS);
10817: 
10818:     if (getComputedStyle(el).position === 'static') {
10819:       setImportant(el, 'position', 'absolute');
10820:     }
10821: 
10822:     setImportant(el, 'width', (window.PMDFloorSizeV184 && window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileW ? window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileW() : '104px'));
10823:     setImportant(el, 'height', (window.PMDFloorSizeV184 && window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileH ? window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileH() : '86px'));
10824:     setImportant(el, 'min-width', (window.PMDFloorSizeV184 && window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileW ? window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileW() : '104px'));
10825:     setImportant(el, 'min-height', (window.PMDFloorSizeV184 && window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileH ? window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileH() : '86px'));
10826:     setImportant(el, 'max-width', (window.PMDFloorSizeV184 && window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileW ? window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileW() : '104px'));
10827:     setImportant(el, 'max-height', (window.PMDFloorSizeV184 && window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileH ? window.PMDFloorSizeV184.tileH() : '86px'));
10828:     setImportant(el, 'transform', 'none');
10829:     setImportant(el, 'filter', 'none');
10830:     setImportant(el, 'transition', 'none');
10831:     setImportant(el, 'animation', 'none');
10832:     setImportant(el, 'text-shadow', 'none');
10833:     setImportant(el, 'color', '#05070d');
10834:     setImportant(el, '-webkit-text-fill-color', '#05070d');
10835: 
10836:     if (shouldBeGreen(tile, no)) {
10837:       el.classList.add('pmd-v175c-table-green');
10838:       el.classList.remove('pmd-v175c-table-red');
10839:       setImportant(el, 'background', '#16c65b');
10840:       setImportant(el, 'border', '4px solid #047a36');
10841:     } else {
10842:       el.classList.add('pmd-v175c-table-red');
10843:       el.classList.remove('pmd-v175c-table-green');
10844:       setImportant(el, 'background', '#ff3347');
10845:       setImportant(el, 'border', '4px solid #b70821');
10846:     }
10847: 
10848:     hideDuplicateNumbers(tile);
10849:     ensureNumber(tile);
10850:   }
10851: 
10852:   function repairFloor() {
10853:     floorElements().forEach(function (floor) {
10854:       setImportant(floor, 'height', 'var(--pmd-v190-floor-height)');
10855:       setImportant(floor, 'min-height', 'var(--pmd-v190-floor-height)');
10856:       setImportant(floor, 'max-height', 'var(--pmd-v190-floor-height)');
10857:       setImportant(floor, 'overflow', 'var(--pmd-v190-floor-overflow)');
10858:       setImportant(floor, 'background', '#ffffff');
10859:       setImportant(floor, 'transform', 'none');
10860:       setImportant(floor, 'transition', 'var(--pmd-v190-floor-transition)');
10861:       setImportant(floor, 'animation', 'none');
10862:     });
10863:   }
10864: 
10865:   function renderBadgeContent(badge, desired) {
10866:     if (desired.kind === 'cleaning') {
10867:       if (!badge.querySelector('img')) {
10868:         badge.textContent = '';
10869:         var img = document.createElement('img');
10870:         img.src = CLEANING_IMG;
10871:         img.alt = 'Cleaning';
10872:         badge.appendChild(img);
10873:       }
10874:       return;
10875:     }
10876: 
10877:     if (badge.querySelector('img') || badge.textContent !== desired.icon) {
10878:       badge.textContent = desired.icon;
10879:     }
10880:   }
10881: 
10882:   function applyAll() {
10883:     removeKnownOldBadges(document);
10884:     repairFloor();
10885: 
10886:     var tiles = findTiles();
10887: 
10888:     tiles.forEach(function (tile) {
10889:       setTileVisual(tile);
10890: 
10891:       var desired = desiredBadge(tile.tableNo);
10892:       var badges = tile.el.querySelectorAll(':scope > .' + BADGE_CLASS);
10893: 
10894:       badges.forEach(function (b, index) {
10895:         if (index > 0) b.remove();
10896:       });
10897: 
10898:       var badge = tile.el.querySelector(':scope > .' + BADGE_CLASS);
10899: 
10900:       if (!desired) {
10901:         if (badge) badge.remove();
10902:         return;
10903:       }
10904: 
10905:       if (!badge) {
10906:         badge = document.createElement('span');
10907:         badge.className = BADGE_CLASS;
10908:         tile.el.appendChild(badge);
10909:       }
10910: 
10911:       badge.setAttribute('data-pmd-kind', desired.kind);
10912:       badge.setAttribute('data-pmd-key', desired.key);
10913:       badge.setAttribute('title', desired.label + ' · Table ' + tile.tableNo);
10914:       renderBadgeContent(badge, desired);
10915:     });
10916: 
10917:     state.updates += 1;
10918:   }
10919: 
10920:   async function refresh() {
10921:     var both = await Promise.all([fetchTables(), fetchAttention()]);
10922:     state.tableMap = both[0] || {};
10923:     state.attentionMap = both[1] || {};
10924:     applyAll();
10925:     return debug(false);
10926:   }
10927: 
10928:   function scheduleApply() {
10929:     if (state.raf) return;
10930: 
10931:     state.raf = requestAnimationFrame(function () {
10932:       state.raf = 0;
10933:       applyAll();
10934:     });
10935:   }
10936: 
10937:   function observe() {
10938:     var root = document.querySelector('#pmd-waiter-dashboard-root') || document.body;
10939: 
10940:     if (state.observer) state.observer.disconnect();
10941: 
10942:     state.observer = new MutationObserver(function () {
10943:       scheduleApply();
10944:     });
10945: 
10946:     state.observer.observe(root, {
10947:       subtree: true,
10948:       childList: true
10949:     });
10950:   }
10951: 
10952:   function debug(printTable) {
10953:     var tiles = findTiles().map(function (tile) {
10954:       var r = tile.el.getBoundingClientRect();
10955:       var badge = tile.el.querySelector(':scope > .' + BADGE_CLASS);
10956:       var numbers = tile.el.querySelectorAll(':scope > .' + NUMBER_CLASS).length;
10957:       var hiddenDupes = tile.el.querySelectorAll(':scope > .' + HIDE_CLASS).length;
10958: 
10959:       return {
10960:         table: tile.tableNo,
10961:         badge: badge ? badge.getAttribute('data-pmd-kind') : '',
10962:         numbers: numbers,
10963:         hiddenDupes: hiddenDupes,
10964:         x: Math.round(r.x),
10965:         y: Math.round(r.y),
10966:         w: Math.round(r.width),
10967:         h: Math.round(r.height),
10968:         bg: getComputedStyle(tile.el).backgroundColor
10969:       };
10970:     });
10971: 
10972:     if (printTable !== false) console.table(tiles);
10973: 
10974:     return {
10975:       active: true,
10976:       updates: state.updates,
10977:       tiles: tiles,
10978:       floors: floorElements().map(function (f) {
10979:         var r = f.getBoundingClientRect();
10980:         return { w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), cls: clean(f.className).slice(0, 100) };
10981:       }),
10982:       oldBadges: document.querySelectorAll(OLD_BADGE_SELECTORS).length,
10983:       oldNumbers: document.querySelectorAll(OLD_NUMBER_SELECTORS).length
10984:     };
10985:   }
10986: 
10987:   function stop() {
10988:     if (state.timer) clearInterval(state.timer);
10989:     if (state.observer) state.observer.disconnect();
10990:     if (state.raf) cancelAnimationFrame(state.raf);
10991:     state.timer = null;
10992:     state.observer = null;
10993:     state.raf = 0;
10994:     console.info('[PMD] V175c no-dupe no-blink stopped');
10995:   }
10996: 
10997:   removeKnownOldBadges(document);
10998:   repairFloor();
10999:   observe();
11000: 
11001:   setTimeout(function () { refresh(); }, 100);
11002:   setTimeout(function () { refresh(); }, 700);
11003:   setTimeout(function () { refresh(); }, 1500);
11004: 
11005:   state.timer = setInterval(function () {
11006:     refresh();
11007:   }, POLL_MS);
11008: 
11009:   window.PMDWaiterFloorStableV175c = {
11010:     active: true,
11011:     refresh: refresh,
11012:     debug: function () { return debug(true); },
11013:     stop: stop
11014:   };
11015: 
11016:   console.info('[PMD] V175c no-dupe no-blink active');
11017: })();
11018: </script>
11019: <!-- PMD_V175C_NO_DUPE_NO_BLINK_END -->
11020: 
11021: 
11022: <script id="pmd-v180-final-floor-last-debug">
11023: (function () {
11024:   'use strict';
11025:   if (!/\/admin\/dashboardwaiter(?:$|[?#\/])/.test(location.pathname + location.search + location.hash)) return;
11026: 
11027:   window.PMDFinalFloorLastV180 = {
11028:     active: true,
11029:     debug: function () {
11030:       var rows = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.pmd-w5-table, .pmd-v155-table, .pmd-floor-table, .pmd-waiter-floor-table')).map(function (el) {
11031:         var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
11032:         var cs = getComputedStyle(el);
11033:         return {
11034:           text: String(el.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim().slice(0, 20),
11035:           x: Math.round(r.x),
11036:           y: Math.round(r.y),
11037:           w: Math.round(r.width),
11038:           h: Math.round(r.height),
11039:           bg: cs.backgroundColor,
11040:           cls: String(el.className || '').slice(0, 120)
11041:         };
11042:       });
11043:       console.table(rows);
11044:       return {
11045:         active: true,
11046:         v175c: typeof window.PMDWaiterFloorStableV175c,
11047:         v175e: typeof window.PMDWaiterBadgeCornerSnapV175e,
11048:         tiles: rows.length,
11049:         oldBadges: document.querySelectorAll('[data-pmd-v170f-slot-badge], .pmd-v170g-pinned-badge, .pmd-v174-attention-badge, .pmd-v175b-attention-badge').length,
11050:         rows: rows
11051:       };
11052:     }
11053:   };
11054: 
11055:   console.info('[PMD] V180 final floor authority runs last active');
11056: })();
11057: </script>
11058: <!-- PMD_V180_FINAL_FLOOR_LAST_WRAPPER_END -->
11059: 
11060: 
11061: 
11062: 
11063: 
11064: 
11065: <!-- PMD_V183_SINGLE_BADGE_AUTHORITY_START -->
11066: <style id="pmd-v183-single-badge-authority-style">
11067: /*
11068:   V183: one badge visual authority only.
11069:   V175e and V182 are removed. This only styles existing top-right badges.
11070: */
11071: 
11072: html.pmd-waiter-dashboard-active .pmd-v175c-attention-badge,
11073: html.pmd-waiter-dashboard-active .pmd-v183-order-count-badge {
11074:   position: absolute !important;
11075:   top: -13px !important;
11076:   right: -13px !important;
11077:   left: auto !important;
11078:   bottom: auto !important;
11079: 
11080:   width: 36px !important;
11081:   height: 36px !important;
11082:   min-width: 36px !important;
11083:   min-height: 36px !important;
11084:   max-width: 36px !important;
11085:   max-height: 36px !important;
11086: 
11087:   border-radius: 999px !important;
11088:   border: 2px solid #061225 !important;
11089:   box-shadow: 0 3px 9px rgba(6, 18, 37, .16) !important;
11090: 
11091:   background: #ffffff !important;
11092:   color: #061225 !important;
11093:   -webkit-text-fill-color: #061225 !important;
11094: 
11095:   display: flex !important;
11096:   align-items: center !important;
11097:   justify-content: center !important;
11098: 
11099:   margin: 0 !important;
11100:   padding: 0 !important;
11101:   box-sizing: border-box !important;
11102: 
11103:   transform: none !important;
11104:   translate: none !important;
11105:   transition: none !important;
11106:   animation: none !important;
11107: 
11108:   z-index: 150 !important;
11109:   pointer-events: none !important;
11110:   overflow: hidden !important;
11111:   opacity: 1 !important;
11112:   visibility: visible !important;
11113: }
11114: 
11115: html.pmd-waiter-dashboard-active .pmd-v175c-attention-badge[data-pmd-kind="waiter"] {
11116:   background: #fff3b8 !important;
11117:   font-size: 22px !important;
11118:   line-height: 1 !important;
11119: }
11120: 
11121: html.pmd-waiter-dashboard-active .pmd-v175c-attention-badge[data-pmd-kind="cleaning"] {
11122:   background: #ffffff !important;
11123: }
11124: 
11125: html.pmd-waiter-dashboard-active .pmd-v175c-attention-badge img {
11126:   width: 25px !important;
11127:   height: 25px !important;
11128:   min-width: 25px !important;
11129:   min-height: 25px !important;
11130:   max-width: 25px !important;
11131:   max-height: 25px !important;
11132:   object-fit: contain !important;
11133:   display: block !important;
11134:   margin: 0 !important;
11135:   padding: 0 !important;
11136:   transform: none !important;
11137:   transition: none !important;
11138:   animation: none !important;
11139: }
11140: 
11141: html.pmd-waiter-dashboard-active .pmd-v183-order-count-badge {
11142:   background: #ffffff !important;
11143:   color: #061225 !important;
11144:   -webkit-text-fill-color: #061225 !important;
11145:   font-size: 18px !important;
11146:   line-height: 1 !important;
11147:   font-weight: 950 !important;
11148:   font-family: inherit !important;
11149: }
11150: </style>
11151: 
11152: <script id="pmd-v183-single-badge-authority-script">
11153: (function () {
11154:   'use strict';
11155: 
11156:   if (!/\/admin\/dashboardwaiter(?:$|[?#\/])/.test(location.pathname + location.search + location.hash)) return;
11157:   if (window.PMDSingleBadgeAuthorityV183 && window.PMDSingleBadgeAuthorityV183.active) return;
11158: 
11159:   var raf = 0;
11160:   var observer = null;
11161: 
11162:   var TILE_SEL = '.pmd-w5-table, .pmd-v155-table, .pmd-floor-table, .pmd-waiter-floor-table';
11163:   var ATTENTION_SEL = '.pmd-v175c-attention-badge';
11164:   var NUMBER_SEL = '.pmd-v175c-table-number';
11165: 
11166:   function clean(v) {
11167:     return String(v == null ? '' : v).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
11168:   }
11169: 
11170:   function imp(el, prop, val) {
11171:     if (!el || !el.style) return;
11172:     if (el.style.getPropertyValue(prop) === val && el.style.getPropertyPriority(prop) === 'important') return;
11173:     el.style.setProperty(prop, val, 'important');
11174:   }
11175: 
11176:   function lockCircle(el, type) {
11177:     if (!el) return;
11178: 
11179:     imp(el, 'position', 'absolute');
11180:     imp(el, 'top', '-13px');
11181:     imp(el, 'right', '-13px');
11182:     imp(el, 'left', 'auto');
11183:     imp(el, 'bottom', 'auto');
11184: 
11185:     imp(el, 'width', '36px');
11186:     imp(el, 'height', '36px');
11187:     imp(el, 'min-width', '36px');
11188:     imp(el, 'min-height', '36px');
11189:     imp(el, 'max-width', '36px');
11190:     imp(el, 'max-height', '36px');
11191: 
11192:     imp(el, 'border-radius', '999px');
11193:     imp(el, 'border', '2px solid #061225');
11194:     imp(el, 'box-shadow', '0 3px 9px rgba(6, 18, 37, .16)');
11195: 
11196:     imp(el, 'background', '#ffffff');
11197:     imp(el, 'color', '#061225');
11198:     imp(el, '-webkit-text-fill-color', '#061225');
11199: 
11200:     imp(el, 'display', 'flex');
11201:     imp(el, 'align-items', 'center');
11202:     imp(el, 'justify-content', 'center');
11203: 
11204:     imp(el, 'margin', '0');
11205:     imp(el, 'padding', '0');
11206:     imp(el, 'box-sizing', 'border-box');
11207: 
11208:     imp(el, 'transform', 'none');
11209:     imp(el, 'translate', 'none');
11210:     imp(el, 'transition', 'none');
11211:     imp(el, 'animation', 'none');
11212: 
11213:     imp(el, 'z-index', '150');
11214:     imp(el, 'pointer-events', 'none');
11215:     imp(el, 'overflow', 'hidden');
11216:     imp(el, 'opacity', '1');
11217:     imp(el, 'visibility', 'visible');
11218: 
11219:     if (type === 'order') {
11220:       el.classList.add('pmd-v183-order-count-badge');
11221:       imp(el, 'font-size', '18px');
11222:       imp(el, 'font-weight', '950');
11223:       imp(el, 'line-height', '1');
11224:     }
11225: 
11226:     var kind = el.getAttribute('data-pmd-kind') || '';
11227: 
11228:     if (kind === 'waiter') {
11229:       imp(el, 'background', '#fff3b8');
11230:       imp(el, 'font-size', '22px');
11231:       imp(el, 'line-height', '1');
11232:     }
11233: 
11234:     if (kind === 'cleaning') {
11235:       imp(el, 'background', '#ffffff');
11236:     }
11237: 
11238:     if (kind === 'note') {
11239:       imp(el, 'background', '#e8f3ff');
11240:       imp(el, 'font-size', '20px');
11241:       imp(el, 'line-height', '1');
11242:     }
11243: 
11244:     var img = el.querySelector('img');
11245:     if (img) {
11246:       imp(img, 'width', '25px');
11247:       imp(img, 'height', '25px');
11248:       imp(img, 'min-width', '25px');
11249:       imp(img, 'min-height', '25px');
11250:       imp(img, 'max-width', '25px');
11251:       imp(img, 'max-height', '25px');
11252:       imp(img, 'object-fit', 'contain');
11253:       imp(img, 'display', 'block');
11254:       imp(img, 'margin', '0');
11255:       imp(img, 'padding', '0');
11256:       imp(img, 'transform', 'none');
11257:       imp(img, 'transition', 'none');
11258:       imp(img, 'animation', 'none');
11259:     }
11260:   }
11261: 
11262:   function looksLikeOrderCount(tile, el) {
11263:     if (!tile || !el || el.nodeType !== 1) return false;
11264:     if (el.matches(ATTENTION_SEL + ',' + NUMBER_SEL)) return false;
11265:     if (el.closest(ATTENTION_SEL)) return false;
11266: 
11267:     var txt = clean(el.textContent || '');
11268:     if (!/^[1-9][0-9]?$/.test(txt)) return false;
11269: 
11270:     var tr = tile.getBoundingClientRect();
11271:     var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
11272: 
11273:     if (r.width > 52 || r.height > 52) return false;
11274: 
11275:     var nearTop = r.top <= tr.top + 32;
11276:     var nearRight = r.left >= tr.right - 56;
11277: 
11278:     return nearTop && nearRight;
11279:   }
11280: 
11281:   function polishTile(tile) {
11282:     if (!tile) return;
11283: 
11284:     imp(tile, 'overflow', 'visible');
11285: 
11286:     var attention = tile.querySelector(':scope > ' + ATTENTION_SEL);
11287:     if (attention) lockCircle(attention, 'attention');
11288: 
11289:     Array.prototype.slice.call(tile.children).forEach(function (child) {
11290:       if (looksLikeOrderCount(tile, child)) {
11291:         lockCircle(child, 'order');
11292:       }
11293:     });
11294:   }
11295: 
11296:   function apply() {
11297:     document.documentElement.classList.add('pmd-waiter-dashboard-active');
11298: 
11299:     Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll(TILE_SEL)).forEach(polishTile);
11300: 
11301:     Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll(ATTENTION_SEL)).forEach(function (el) {
11302:       lockCircle(el, 'attention');
11303:     });
11304: 
11305:     return debug(false);
11306:   }
11307: 
11308:   function schedule() {
11309:     if (raf) return;
11310: 
11311:     raf = requestAnimationFrame(function () {
11312:       raf = 0;
11313:       apply();
11314:     });
11315:   }
11316: 
11317:   function debug(print) {
11318:     var rows = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll(TILE_SEL)).map(function (tile) {
11319:       var r = tile.getBoundingClientRect();
11320:       var attention = tile.querySelector(':scope > ' + ATTENTION_SEL);
11321:       var orderBadges = Array.prototype.slice.call(tile.children).filter(function (child) {
11322:         return child.classList && child.classList.contains('pmd-v183-order-count-badge');
11323:       });
11324: 
11325:       return {
11326:         text: clean(tile.textContent).slice(0, 28),
11327:         attention: attention ? (attention.getAttribute('data-pmd-kind') || 'yes') : '',
11328:         orderBadges: orderBadges.map(function (x) { return clean(x.textContent); }).join(','),
11329:         x: Math.round(r.x),
11330:         y: Math.round(r.y),
11331:         w: Math.round(r.width),
11332:         h: Math.round(r.height)
11333:       };
11334:     });
11335: 
11336:     if (print !== false) console.table(rows);
11337: 
11338:     return {
11339:       active: true,
11340:       tiles: rows.length,
11341:       attentionBadges: document.querySelectorAll(ATTENTION_SEL).length,
11342:       orderBadges: document.querySelectorAll('.pmd-v183-order-count-badge').length,
11343:       oldBadgeLayers: {
11344:         v175e: typeof window.PMDWaiterBadgeCornerSnapV175e,
11345:         v182: typeof window.PMDTopRightBadgePolishV182
11346:       },
11347:       rows: rows
11348:     };
11349:   }
11350: 
11351:   observer = new MutationObserver(schedule);
11352:   observer.observe(document.querySelector('#pmd-waiter-dashboard-root') || document.body, {
11353:     subtree: true,
11354:     childList: true
11355:   });
11356: 
11357:   apply();
11358:   setTimeout(apply, 200);
11359:   setTimeout(apply, 900);
11360:   setTimeout(apply, 1800);
11361: 
11362:   window.PMDSingleBadgeAuthorityV183 = {
11363:     active: true,
11364:     apply: apply,
11365:     debug: function () { return debug(true); },
11366:     stop: function () {
11367:       if (observer) observer.disconnect();
11368:       if (raf) cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
11369:       observer = null;
11370:       raf = 0;
11371:       console.info('[PMD] V183 single badge authority stopped');
11372:     }
11373:   };
11374: 
11375:   console.info('[PMD] V183 single badge authority active');
11376: })();
11377: </script>
11378: <!-- PMD_V183_SINGLE_BADGE_AUTHORITY_END -->
11379: 
11380: 
11381: 
11382: 
11383: 
11384: 
11385: 
11386: 
11387: 
11388: 
11389: 
11390: 
11391: 
11392: 
11393: 
11394: 
11395: 
11396: 
11397: 
11398: 
11399: 
11400: 
11401: 
11402: 
11403: <!-- PMD_V190_CONTAINER_ONLY_FLOOR_COMPACT_START -->
11404: <script id="pmd-v190-container-only-floor-compact-script">
11405: (function () {
11406:   'use strict';
11407:   if (!/\/admin\/dashboardwaiter(?:$|[?#\/])/.test(location.pathname + location.search + location.hash)) return;
11408:   if (window.PMDFloorDeterministicV190 && window.PMDFloorDeterministicV190.active) return;
11409: 
11410:   var ROOT = '#pmd-waiter-dashboard-root';
11411:   var BUTTON = ROOT + ' .pmd-w19-tools button[data-w19-compact]';
11412:   var observer = null;
11413:   var raf = 0;
11414: 
11415:   function root() { return document.querySelector(ROOT); }
11416:   function floor() { var r = root(); return r ? r.querySelector('.pmd-w5-floor-map-real') : null; }
11417:   function button() { return document.querySelector(BUTTON); }
11418:   function compact() { var r = root(); return !!(r && r.classList.contains('pmd-w19-compact')); }
11419: 
11420:   function cleanup() {
11421:     document.documentElement.classList.remove(
11422:       'pmd-v184-floor-small', 'pmd-v184-floor-large',
11423:       'pmd-v185-floor-small', 'pmd-v185-floor-large', 'pmd-v185-sizing',
11424:       'pmd-v187-floor-small', 'pmd-v187-floor-large', 'pmd-v187-sizing',
11425:       'pmd-v188-floor-compact', 'pmd-v188-floor-expanded',
11426:       'pmd-v189-floor-compact', 'pmd-v189-floor-expanded'
11427:     );
11428:     document.querySelectorAll('.pmd-v185-floor-scaler, .pmd-v187-floor-scaler').forEach(function (node) {
11429:       var parent = node.parentElement;
11430:       if (!parent) return;
11431:       while (node.firstChild) parent.insertBefore(node.firstChild, node);
11432:       node.remove();
11433:     });
11434:   }
11435: 
11436:   function apply() {
11437:     var r = root();
11438:     if (!r) return;
11439:     cleanup();
11440:     r.classList.toggle('pmd-v190-floor-compact', compact());
11441:     r.classList.toggle('pmd-v190-floor-expanded', !compact());
11442:     var f = floor();
11443:     if (f && compact()) f.removeAttribute('data-pmd-v159-full-floor');
11444:     var b = button();
11445:     if (b) {
11446:       b.setAttribute('title', compact() ? 'Expand floor' : 'Compact floor');
11447:       b.setAttribute('aria-label', compact() ? 'Expand floor' : 'Compact floor');
11448:       b.setAttribute('aria-pressed', compact() ? 'true' : 'false');
11449:       b.setAttribute('data-pmd-v190-mode', compact() ? 'compact' : 'expanded');
11450:     }
11451:   }
11452: 
11453:   function schedule() {
11454:     if (raf) return;
11455:     raf = requestAnimationFrame(function () { raf = 0; apply(); });
11456:   }
11457: 
11458:   function clickButton() { var b = button(); if (b) b.click(); }
11459: 
11460:   document.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
11461:     var target = event.target && event.target.nodeType === 1 ? event.target : null;
11462:     if (!target || !target.closest(BUTTON)) return;
11463:     setTimeout(apply, 0);
11464:     setTimeout(apply, 90);
11465:     setTimeout(apply, 240);
11466:   }, true);
11467: 
11468:   document.addEventListener('pmd-waiter-dashboard-rendered', function () {
11469:     setTimeout(apply, 0);
11470:     setTimeout(apply, 120);
11471:   }, true);
11472: 
11473:   ['pmd_waiter_floor_compact', 'PMD_WAITER_FLOOR_COMPACT_V89',
11474:    'pmd_waiter_floor_size_v184', 'pmd_waiter_floor_scale_v185',
11475:    'pmd_waiter_floor_scale_v187', 'pmd_waiter_floor_compact_v188',
11476:    'pmd_waiter_floor_compact_v189', 'pmd_waiter_floor_positions_v189',
11477:    'pmd_waiter_floor_compact_v190'].forEach(function (key) {
11478:     try { localStorage.removeItem(key); } catch (error) {}
11479:   });
11480: 
11481:   apply();
11482:   var r = root();
11483:   if (r) {
11484:     observer = new MutationObserver(schedule);
11485:     observer.observe(r, {attributes:true, attributeFilter:['class'], childList:true});
11486:   }
11487:   requestAnimationFrame(function () {
11488:     requestAnimationFrame(function () {
11489:       var current = root();
11490:       if (current) current.classList.add('pmd-v190-floor-ready');
11491:       apply();
11492:     });
11493:   });
11494: 
11495:   window.PMDFloorDeterministicV190 = {
11496:     active: true,
11497:     apply: apply,
11498:     toggle: clickButton,
11499:     compact: function () { if (!compact()) clickButton(); },
11500:     expand: function () { if (compact()) clickButton(); },
11501:     expanded: function () { if (compact()) clickButton(); },
11502:     debug: function () {
11503:       var f = floor();
11504:       var tiles = f ? Array.prototype.slice.call(f.querySelectorAll('.pmd-w5-table[data-table]')) : [];
11505:       var points = {};
11506:       tiles.forEach(function (tile) {
11507:         var rect = tile.getBoundingClientRect();
11508:         points[Math.round(rect.x) + ',' + Math.round(rect.y)] = true;
11509:       });
11510:       var out = {
11511:         active: true,
11512:         mode: compact() ? 'compact' : 'expanded',
11513:         floorHeight: f ? Math.round(f.getBoundingClientRect().height) : 0,
11514:         tableCount: tiles.length,
11515:         uniqueTablePositions: Object.keys(points).length,
11516:         scalerCount: document.querySelectorAll('.pmd-v185-floor-scaler, .pmd-v187-floor-scaler').length
11517:       };
11518:       console.log(out);
11519:       return out;
11520:     },
11521:     stop: function () {
11522:       if (observer) observer.disconnect();
11523:       if (raf) cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
11524:       observer = null;
11525:       raf = 0;
11526:     }
11527:   };
11528:   console.info('[PMD] V190 container-only floor compact active');
11529: })();
11530: </script>
11531: <!-- PMD_V190_CONTAINER_ONLY_FLOOR_COMPACT_END -->
11532: 
11533: </body>
11534: </html>
11535: 
11536: <!-- PMD_OWNER_V122_DASHBOARD2_EXACT_MAIN_KPI_COLORS_START -->
11537: <style id="pmd-owner-v122-dashboard2-exact-main-kpi-colors-style">
11538: /*
11539:   Dashboard2 v122
11540:   Fix: top 4 KPI colors must match main dashboard.
11541:   No iframe mirror. No invented colors on normal cards.
11542: */
11543: 
11544: html.pmd-dashboard2-active,
11545: html.pmd-dashboard2-active body {
11546:   overflow: hidden !important;
11547:   background: #f6f8fb !important;
11548: }
11549: 
11550: html.pmd-dashboard2-active #pmd-dashboard2-quick-btn,
11551: html.pmd-dashboard2-active .pmd-d2-quick-btn,
11552: html.pmd-dashboard2-active [id*="dashboard2"][id*="quick"],
11553: html.pmd-dashboard2-active [class*="dashboard2"][class*="quick"] {
11554:   display: none !important;
11555:   visibility: hidden !important;
11556:   opacity: 0 !important;
11557:   pointer-events: none !important;
